name: Appointment Recall Reminder
subject: Time for {{first_name}}'s next visit at Bright Smiles
html_content:
Hello {{first_name}}

Our records show your family is due to schedule a routine checkup and cleaning with us. Call (313) 555-0604 or book online at brightsmilesdearborn.com. We look forward to seeing you.

name: Appointment Confirmation
subject: Your appointment at Bright Smiles is confirmed
html_content: This confirms your upcoming appointment at Bright Smiles Pediatric Dentistry. Please arrive a few minutes early. Need to reschedule? Visit our booking page or call the office.

name: Seasonal Wellness Newsletter
subject: Bright Smiles — {{month}} wellness newsletter
html_content:
{{month}} Newsletter

{{body}}

name: Free Screening Day Announcement
subject: Free children's dental screening day this {{weekday}}
html_content: Join us for our community free dental screening day at Bright Smiles Pediatric Dentistry. Open to all Dearborn-area families. No appointment needed.

name: Healthy Smiles Tips
subject: Gentle smile-care reminder for {{month}}
html_content: A few friendly reminders from our team: brush twice a day, swap out toothbrushes every few months, and keep up with regular checkups. Healthy habits start young.

name: 6-Month Cleaning Due
subject: It's been six months, {{first_name}} — time for a cleaning
html_content: Hello {{first_name}}, it's been about six months since your family's last visit. Regular cleanings keep smiles healthy. Call us or book online to reserve a time.

name: Back-to-School Checkup Reminder
subject: {{month}} reminder: book your back-to-school checkup
html_content:
Back-to-school season is here

Start the school year with a healthy smile. Schedule your family's checkup at Bright Smiles — appointments fill quickly this time of year.

name: Summer Checkup Reminder
subject: Summer is a great time for a checkup, {{first_name}}
html_content: Hello {{first_name}}, summer break is an easy time to fit in a routine visit. Reserve your spot at Bright Smiles before the back-to-school rush.

name: New Patient Welcome
subject: Welcome to Bright Smiles, {{first_name}}
html_content: Dear {{first_name}}, welcome to Bright Smiles Pediatric Dentistry. We're so glad your family chose us. Reach out anytime with questions before your first visit.

name: Office Hours Update
subject: Updated office hours this {{weekday}}
html_content: A quick note from Bright Smiles: our office hours are adjusting this {{weekday}}. Please check brightsmilesdearborn.com before your visit. Thank you.

name: Insurance Benefit Reminder
subject: Use your dental benefits before year-end, {{first_name}}
html_content: Hello {{first_name}}, many dental benefits reset at year-end. If your family has a visit due, now is a great time to schedule and make the most of your coverage.

name: First Visit Preparation
subject: Getting ready for your child's first visit
html_content: A friendly first visit helps build lifelong healthy habits. We keep things calm and fun. Bring any questions and we'll walk through everything together.

name: Community Outreach Update
subject: Bright Smiles in the community — {{month}} update
html_content:
Community Update

{{body}} Thank you for being part of the Bright Smiles family.

name: Holiday Hours Notice
subject: Holiday hours at Bright Smiles Pediatric Dentistry
html_content: Our office will adjust hours over the holiday. Please check the posted schedule at brightsmilesdearborn.com before stopping by. Happy holidays from our team.

name: Office News Roundup
subject: What's new at Bright Smiles this {{month}}, {{first_name}}
html_content: Hello {{first_name}}, here are a few updates from the practice this {{month}}. Thanks for trusting us with your family's smiles.

name: Appointment Day Reminder
subject: Reminder: your visit is this {{weekday}}
html_content: Just a friendly reminder that your family's appointment at Bright Smiles is this {{weekday}}. Please call ahead if you need to reschedule. See you soon.

name: Recall Follow-Up Notice
subject: We'd love to see your family back this {{month}}
html_content: It's been a while since your last visit. Routine checkups keep smiles healthy and catch small things early. Give us a call to find a time that works.

name: Thank You For Your Visit
subject: Thank you for visiting Bright Smiles
html_content: Dear {{first_name}}, thank you for visiting Bright Smiles Pediatric Dentistry. We're grateful for your trust and look forward to seeing your family again soon.

name: Seasonal Smile Tips Spotlight
subject: {{month}} smile-care spotlight
html_content:
{{month}} Smile Tips

{{body}} Wishing your family healthy smiles from all of us at Bright Smiles.

name: Sealant Follow-Up Reminder
subject: Time for a sealant follow-up, {{first_name}}
html_content: Hello {{first_name}}, your family is due for a routine sealant check at your next visit. Book a convenient time online or give the office a call.
